title: Infra Architect
description:
Responsibilities:

• Lead the design, architecture, and implementation of complex infrastructure solutions, including compute, storage, networking, cloud platforms, and related technologies.

• Develop and maintain infrastructure roadmaps, standards, policies, and best practices in alignment with business objectives and industry trends.

• Provide technical leadership and guidance to infrastructure teams, overseeing project delivery from concept to production.

• Evaluate and recommend new technologies and solutions to improve efficiency, performance, security, and cost-effectiveness of our infrastructure.

• Collaborate with various business units, application development teams, and other stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into technical infrastructure designs.

• Perform capacity planning, performance tuning, and troubleshooting of critical infrastructure components.

• Ensure adherence to security best practices, compliance regulations, and internal governance frameworks.

• Develop and review technical documentation, including architecture diagrams, design specifications, and operational procedures.

• Act as a subject matter expert for complex infrastructure challenges and provide high-level technical support.

• Mentor junior architects and engineers, fostering a culture of technical excellence and continuous improvement.


Requirements:
Education:

• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field. Master's degree preferred.

• Minimum of 8-10 years of progressive experience in IT infrastructure architecture, with at least 3-5 years in a senior architect role within a large enterprise, preferably in the financial services sector.

Essential:

• Deep expertise in designing and implementing solutions across multiple infrastructure domains, including:

• Cloud Platforms: Extensive experience with AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform (certifications highly desirable).

• Virtualization & Containerization: VMware, OpenStack, Kubernetes, Docker.

• Operating Systems: Linux (RHEL, Ubuntu), Windows Server.

• Networking: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN, Firewalls, Load Balancers (e.g., F5), SDN.

• Storage: SAN, NAS, Object Storage, Backup & Recovery solutions.

• Databases: Relational (e.g., Oracle, SQL Server) and NoSQL databases.

• Proven experience with infrastructure as code (IaC) tools such as Terraform, Ansible, or CloudFormation.

• Strong understanding of cybersecurity principles, data protection, and compliance frameworks (e.g., MAS TRM, ISO 27001).

• Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.

• Ability to communicate complex technical concepts effectively to both technical and non-technical audiences.

• Strong leadership qualities with the ability to influence and drive change across teams.

• Relevant industry certifications (e.g., TOGAF, ITIL, CISSP, Cloud Architect certifications) are a significant advantage.

Key Domain/ Technical Skills

• AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform

• VMware, OpenStack, Kubernetes, Docker.
